title: christella jaculosa
intro: Christella jaculosa, also known as the forked rock fern or forked fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Christella jaculosa include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system and preventing oxidative stress. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, with some herbalists also using it in salves and creams to treat skin conditions.
